ceoDash.title: CEO Dash
ceoDash.subtitle: Business-wide intake volume, funnel health, activity, and cost placeholders — scoped to the latest session batch from the engine.
ceoDash.scopeNote: Figures below aggregate every organization in the current API snapshot (up to 100 recent sessions). They are operational slices, not a full analytics warehouse.
ceoDash.orgEmpty: No sessions in the current snapshot.
ceoDash.costsIntro: Usage-based spend (telephony, transcription, model inference) is not wired into this view yet. Connect billing exports or engine telemetry to populate these cards.

home.title: EasyIntake App
home.intro: Conversation-powered intake with structured data, validation, and handoff to your systems.
home.signedInBlurb: Use the dashboard for funnel health, handoff reliability, and operational KPIs across channels.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Industry-agnostic view of intake, verification, completion, and transfer to your destinations — comparable across organizations and channels.

superAdmin.demoModeOn: You are viewing demo metrics (illustrative sample data).
superAdmin.liveModeOn: You are viewing live metrics from your intake API.

demo.banner: Demo mode: sample funnel and KPIs for walkthroughs — no intake API calls for this view.

conversion.hint: Illustrative conversion rates for layout and stakeholder demos only.

kpis.channelMixValue: Voice {voice, number}% · Messaging {messaging, number}% · Partner {partner, number}%

dashboard.liveDataNote: Metrics are computed from the latest intake sessions returned by your API (up to 100 rows). Status values are grouped into journey phases; conversion rates are approximate shares across that list, not a full analytics warehouse.
dashboard.loadErrorNote: Could not load sessions for this view. Confirm the web app can reach your intake API and that server-side auth (BFF token) is configured.

funnel.intakeDesc: Capture requests from voice, messaging, or partner events.
funnel.validateDesc: Confirm identity, eligibility, consent, and data quality rules.
funnel.closeDesc: Finalize agreement and payment or equivalent settlement step for your workflow.
funnel.transferDesc: Deliver structured records to CRM, case tools, webhooks, or warehouses.

conversion.liveHint: Percentages are derived from how many sessions in the current list sit at or beyond each phase (by status). They summarize the batch, not a historical funnel.
conversion.validateToClose: At or past close (of those past intake)
conversion.closeToTransfer: Transferred (of those at close or beyond)

sales.filterCarrierTitle: Filter by the program or carrier bucket stored as the intake vertical identifier (verticalId) on each session.
sales.filterProductTitle: Filter by product or application package identifier (configPackageId) on each session.
sales.demoFilterHint: Sample program and package values for layout; numbers adjust for demo only.
sales.leadsHint: Count of intake sessions in the current list and filters. Excludes failed and cancelled. Each row is one opportunity in this snapshot (not a full marketing warehouse).
sales.appsStartedHint: Sessions where application work has begun: status is past created, or completeness is above zero. Excludes failed and cancelled.
sales.appsCompletedHint: Sessions whose intake is finished on your side and ready for filing or handoff: status is ready to submit, submitted, or synced. Excludes failed and cancelled.
sales.appsSubmittedHint: Sessions filed or sent forward in your workflow: status is submitted or synced.
sales.appsAcceptedHint: Sessions confirmed as successfully received downstream: status is synced (aligned to your engine’s terminal handoff state).

kpis.channelMixValue: Voice {voice, number}% · Messaging {messaging, number}% · Partner {partner, number}%

activity.empty: No sessions yet, or none returned for your account.

applications.title: Applications
applications.filterPlaceholder: Search by name, call, status, or package…
applications.loadErrorNoOrg: Choose or create an organization in your account (Clerk), then refresh this page. Intake data is scoped to your active organization.
applications.onboardingSettingUpHint: We are preparing your organization so intake sessions stay private to your team.
applications.onboardingPendingInviteBody: You have a pending organization invitation. Accept it from your email or the Clerk account menu, then return here. We do not create a second organization while an invite is open.
applications.onboardingBootstrapFailed: We could not finish organization setup. Check that Organizations are enabled in Clerk, then try again.
applications.queueEmptyOnboarding: No applications yet for this organization. New intake work will appear here as it arrives.
applications.onboardingBannerBody: Finish organization onboarding to define your customer pipeline stages.
applications.transcriptEmpty: No transcript segments for this call yet.

session.title: Application
session.hitlPlaceholder: Approval actions will connect to the engine when available.
session.noVoiceChannel: No active voice leg for this session.
session.openLiveCallConfigure: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_HTML_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to your apps/api origin (e.g. Railway) to enable the live call link.
session.linkHint: Share this secure link with the applicant. Copy it before leaving this page if the full URL is not shown.
session.noApplyUrl: Set APPLICANT_PORTAL_BASE_URL on the API server to include a full URL when copying or sending SMS.
session.requestedFieldsHint: Checked items appear as a priority on the applicant microsite.
session.applicationsFromCallHint: Each row is a separate application. New ones reuse the stored call transcript.
session.newApplicationError: Could not create application. Ensure the call has a saved transcript.
session.newApplicationMissingCallSid: No Call SID is linked to this session.

voiceBridge.title: Voice agent console
voiceBridge.description: Open the realtime agent UI hosted on the intake API. Your browser tab will receive a fresh WebSocket token from this app.
voiceBridge.configureHint: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_HTML_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (e.g. your Railway API origin) so the voice console link resolves.
voiceBridge.errorUnauthorized: You must be signed in to open the voice console.
voiceBridge.errorGeneric: Could not issue a token. Try again.
voiceBridge.errorConfigure: Could not build the agent URL. Check your environment variables.

live.title: Live Demo
live.subtitle: Share this screen while on a voice intake: connect to a Call SID, watch transcript and fields update from the engine.
live.fieldConfidenceAriaUnknown: Extraction confidence for {field} is not recorded for this value.
live.agentInstructionStep2: Enter the last 4 digits of the caller’s phone number.
live.agentInstructionStep3: Tap Connect to Call for Data Collection when the call is found (use Disconnect when finished).
live.callerLastFourHint: We look up your recent Twilio calls in the background when you enter 4 digits.
live.twilioLast4NotFound: No recent call matches those 4 digits. Check the number or try again after the caller connects.
live.connectToCallDataCollection: Connect to Call for Data Collection
live.connectToCallDataCollectionDisabledHint: Enter 4 digits that match a recent call, or wait while we look it up.
live.errorCallSid: Could not connect: no call matched those 4 digits. Check the number and try again.
live.errorApiBase: Configure NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL so the browser can open a WebSocket to the API.
live.errorToken: Could not get a WebSocket token. Sign in and ensure API_JWT_SECRET matches the API.
live.errorWs: WebSocket error. Check Call SID, token, and API URL.
live.twilioLoadError: Could not load Twilio calls (check API route and credentials).
live.twilioEmpty: No calls yet — place a test call or refresh after dialing.
live.transcriptEmpty: Transcript appears after you connect and speech is processed.
live.applicationPanelHint: Full catalog by section. Values update as the transcript is processed while you are connected.
live.applicationEmpty: No field catalog is available for this selection.
live.callEndedHint: Call ended — reconnect if you continue on a new leg.
live.agentAdviceEditableHint: Type values here for any missing fields — no need to use the full field list.
live.pdfWrongPreset: Select Imm - N400 or NLG - Term Life to download a PDF for that template.
live.pdfDownloadError: Could not generate PDF. Check Anvil configuration and try again.
live.extractWrongPreset: Switch to a life insurance product to run extraction (not immigration N-400).
live.extractNeedCallSid: Enter a Call SID with a stored transcript.
live.extractError: Extraction failed. Check the Call SID and API logs.
live.extractPreservedCorrections: {count} field(s) were left unchanged to preserve manual corrections.
live.applicantLinkHint: Share this link with the applicant to complete their application.
live.agentAdviceEmpty: No missing fields for the current Product / Form selection.
live.crmNoRecordBody: No matching contact record in CRM yet. Connect and capture identity or contact fields to link a record.

liveCall.title: Live Call Data Intake
liveCall.fieldConfidenceAriaUnknown: Extraction confidence for {field} is not recorded for this value.
liveCall.agentInstructionStep2: Enter the last 4 digits of the caller’s phone number.
liveCall.agentInstructionStep3: Tap Connect to Call for Data Collection when the call is found (use Disconnect when finished).
liveCall.callerLastFourHint: We look up your recent Twilio calls in the background when you enter 4 digits.
liveCall.twilioLast4NotFound: No recent call matches those 4 digits. Check the number or try again after the caller connects.
liveCall.connectToCallDataCollection: Connect to Call for Data Collection
liveCall.connectToCallDataCollectionDisabledHint: Enter 4 digits that match a recent call, or wait while we look it up.
liveCall.errorCallSid: Could not connect: no call matched those 4 digits. Check the number and try again.
liveCall.errorApiBase: Configure NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL so the browser can open a WebSocket to the API.
liveCall.errorToken: Could not get a WebSocket token. Sign in and ensure API_JWT_SECRET matches the API.
liveCall.errorWs: WebSocket error. Check Call SID, token, and API URL.
liveCall.twilioLoadError: Could not load Twilio calls (check API route and credentials).
liveCall.twilioEmpty: No calls yet — place a test call or refresh after dialing.
liveCall.transcriptEmpty: Transcript appears after you connect and speech is processed.
liveCall.applicationPanelHint: Full catalog by section. Values update as the transcript is processed while you are connected.
liveCall.applicationEmpty: No field catalog is available for this selection.
liveCall.callEndedHint: Call ended — reconnect if you continue on a new leg.
liveCall.agentAdviceEditableHint: Type values here for any missing fields — no need to use the full field list.
liveCall.pdfWrongPreset: Select Imm - N400 or NLG - Term Life to download a PDF for that template.
liveCall.pdfDownloadError: Could not generate PDF. Check Anvil configuration and try again.
liveCall.extractWrongPreset: Switch to a life insurance product to run extraction (not immigration N-400).
liveCall.extractNeedCallSid: Enter a Call SID with a stored transcript.
liveCall.extractError: Extraction failed. Check the Call SID and API logs.
liveCall.extractPreservedCorrections: {count} field(s) were left unchanged to preserve manual corrections.
liveCall.applicantLinkHint: Share this link with the applicant to complete their application.
liveCall.agentAdviceEmpty: No missing fields for the current Product / Form selection.
liveCall.crmNoRecordBody: No matching contact record in CRM yet. Connect and capture identity or contact fields to link a record.
liveCall.productLockedHint: Product is fixed for this call after you connect. Start a new application from the session record to use the same transcript with another product.

settings.pageSubtitle: Connect your CRM to receive leads automatically.

organization.sectionHint: This profile can power your dashboard and future applicant experiences. Logo files are stored securely; a public link is saved on your Clerk organization.
organization.noOrgHint: Select an organization from your account menu, then return here to edit your organization profile.
organization.logoEmpty: No logo yet. Upload an image or fetch one from your website.
organization.fetchLogoHint: Uses the website URL above. We look for common icons and Open Graph images, then you can approve before it is stored.

errors.NO_ORG: Choose an organization in your account menu, then try again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don’t have permission to edit organization settings.
errors.VALIDATION: Check the website URL (https) and logo file type (PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF).
errors.CLERK: Could not save organization settings. Try again.
errors.UPLOAD_FAILED: Logo upload failed. Try again or pick a smaller file.
errors.BLOB_NOT_CONFIGURED: File storage is not configured (missing BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN).
errors.NETWORK: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.FETCH_FAILED: Could not find a suitable logo on that site. Try uploading a file instead.
errors.FETCH_NOT_HTML: That URL did not return a web page we could read.

users.sectionHint: Add people to your Clerk organization. They receive an email with a link to accept and sign in.

invite.dialogHint: We will email an invitation link so they can join your current organization.
invite.success: Invitation sent. They will get an email shortly.

errors.NO_ORG: Choose an organization in your account menu, then try again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don’t have permission to invite users.
errors.VALIDATION: Enter a valid name and email.
errors.CLERK: Could not send invitation. Check the email address or try again.
errors.NETWORK: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

crm.sectionHint: Connect Pipedrive or GoHighLevel to automatically send leads and applications.

addForm.pdfHint: Select an application PDF to map fields from.
addForm.manualHint: Add field labels your agents should capture for this application.
addForm.saveNote: Review the AI draft below. Publishing into your org vertical config is a separate admin step.
addForm.analyzeError: Could not analyze PDF. Check API URL, JWT, and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
addForm.draftPreviewTitle: Proposed catalog (HITL — copy or merge into packages/shared)
addForm.contextDocsPrompt: Please upload any documents with applicant instructions, or information about the form/application that could be helpful.
addForm.contextDocsDecisionHint: These materials give our systems context for the form and will support future automated flows—such as decision trees and if/then rules—when generation is enabled for your workspace.
addForm.contextDocsAcceptHint: You can attach PDF, Word (.doc, .docx), plain text or Markdown, and images (PNG, JPEG, WebP).

pipeline.sectionHint: Ordered stages for leads and customers. Used for filters and reporting labels. Both English and Spanish labels are stored.

errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to edit the pipeline.
errors.NO_ORG: Choose an organization, then try again.
errors.VALIDATION: Check stage ids (lowercase slugs) and labels.

n400Demo.title: N-400 webform (demo)
n400Demo.subtitle: Same FieldValueMap keys as live voice when the session uses the uscis-n400 package. Data stays in this browser tab.

apply.title: Complete your application
apply.subtitle: Update your information and save as you go. Required and requested items are highlighted.
apply.loadError: This link is invalid or expired. Contact your representative.

onboarding.title: Organization onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: Describe your business and define the stages leads and customers move through. You can edit this later in Settings.
onboarding.welcome: Welcome. I will help you set up your pipeline stages. You can start from a template (for example insurance applications or a simple sales funnel) or describe your process in your own words. What kind of intake do you run?
onboarding.resumeHint: You have already completed onboarding. You can continue chatting to adjust your pipeline, or manage stages in Settings.
onboarding.emptyAssistant: (No text reply — see proposed pipeline below if shown.)

errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to run onboarding.
errors.NO_ORG: Choose an organization in your account menu, then try again.
errors.VALIDATION: Invalid request. Refresh and try again.
errors.LLM_NOT_CONFIGURED: The assistant is not configured (missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on the server).
errors.LLM_FAILED: The assistant could not respond. Try again.
errors.NETWORK: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.CLERK: Could not save organization settings. Try again.

blocked.MESSAGE_TOO_LONG: That message is too long for this step. Shorten it and focus on your pipeline stages.
blocked.TOPIC_NOT_ALLOWED: I can only help with Easy Intake onboarding: your customer pipeline stages and labels. Ask about stages, templates, or English/Spanish labels.
blocked.JAILBREAK_OR_POLICY: That request cannot be processed here. Continue with pipeline setup only.
blocked.TRANSCRIPT_TOO_LARGE: This chat is too long. Refresh the page and continue with a shorter summary of your pipeline.

agencyOnboarding.noAgency: No intake workspace is linked to this organization yet. Connect your CRM in Settings or contact support.
agencyOnboarding.completeNote: You can start taking calls from the applications queue or try the live demo.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.heading: Welcome to Easy Intake
welcome.bullet1: We will walk through agency profile, CRM, and phone setup so you are ready for your first call.
welcome.bullet2: Most teams finish in about two minutes for this overview; detailed configuration can continue in Settings.
welcome.bullet3: You can switch language anytime with the locale control in the header.

agency_profile.title: Agency profile
agency_profile.heading: Tell us about your agency
agency_profile.bullet1: Agency name as it should appear to applicants and in handoffs.
agency_profile.bullet2: Website URL — we will use this later to pull logo and branding automatically.
agency_profile.bullet3: Primary phone number for intake and callbacks.

crm_connect.title: Connect GoHighLevel
crm_connect.heading: Link your CRM
crm_connect.bullet1: Connect your GoHighLevel location so leads and messages flow into Easy Intake.
crm_connect.bullet2: You can use OAuth or an API key depending on how your workspace is set up.
crm_connect.bullet3: Skip this step if you will connect CRM later from Settings.

phone_setup.title: Phone setup
phone_setup.heading: Twilio intake number
phone_setup.bullet1: Review the Twilio number assigned to your workspace for inbound intake calls.
phone_setup.bullet2: Confirm call forwarding so agents or your front desk receive live calls.
phone_setup.bullet3: We will validate voice health before you go live.

invite_team.title: Invite team
invite_team.heading: Bring your team (optional)
invite_team.bullet1: Invite colleagues by email so they can sign in under your organization.
invite_team.bullet2: Roles can be refined later in your identity provider or Settings.
invite_team.bullet3: Skip if you are the only user for now.

first_call.title: You are ready
first_call.heading: Start your first intake call
first_call.bullet1: Your intake number and voice bridge are configured for this organization.
first_call.bullet2: Use Live demo for a safe walkthrough or open Applications for real sessions.
first_call.bullet3: You can revisit any step from Settings at any time.
